2604.08923.title: NCL-BU at SemEval-2026 Task 3: Fine-tuning XLM-RoBERTa for Multilingual Dimensional Sentiment Regression
2604.08923.paper_summary: Dimensional Aspect-Based Sentiment Analysis (DimABSA) extends traditional ABSA from categorical polarity labels to continuous valence-arousal (VA) regression. This paper describes a system developed for Track A - Subtask 1 (Dimensional Aspect Sentiment Regression), aiming to predict real-valued VA scores in the [1, 9] range for each given aspect in a text. A fine-tuning approach based on XLM-RoBERTa-base is adopted, constructing the input as [CLS] T [SEP] a_i [SEP] and training dual regression heads with sigmoid-scaled outputs for valence and arousal prediction. Separate models are trained for each language-domain combination (English and Chinese across restaurant, laptop, and finance domains), and training and development sets are merged for final test predictions. In development experiments, the fine-tuning approach is compared against several large language models including GPT-5.2, LLaMA-3-70B, LLaMA-3.3-70B, and LLaMA-4-Maverick under a few-shot prompting setting, demonstrating that task-specific fine-tuning substantially and consistently outperforms these LLM-based methods across all evaluation datasets. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/tongwu17/SemEval-2026-Task3-Track-A.
2604.08923.paper_summary_zh: 維度基於方面的情感分析（DimABSA）將傳統的ABSA從類別極性標籤擴展到連續的價值-喚起（VA）回歸。這篇論文描述了一個為Track A - Subtask 1（維度方面情感回歸）開發的系統，旨在為文本中每個給定的方面預測範圍在[1, 9]內的實值VA分數。採用基於XLM-RoBERTa-base的微調方法，將輸入構建為[CLS] T [SEP] a_i [SEP]，並訓練具有sigmoid縮放輸出的雙重回歸頭以進行價值和喚起預測。對於每種語言-領域組合（英語和中文，涵蓋餐廳、筆記本電腦和金融領域）訓練了單獨的模型，並合併訓練和開發集以進行最終測試預測。在開發實驗中，將微調方法與幾個大型語言模型進行比較，包括GPT-5.2、LLaMA-3-70B、LLaMA-3.3-70B和LLaMA-4-Maverick，並在少量提示設置下進行，顯示出任務特定的微調在所有評估數據集上顯著且一致地優於這些基於LLM的方法。代碼可在https://github.com/tongwu17/SemEval-2026-Task3-Track-A公開獲得。
2604.08923.author: Tong Wu et.al.
2604.08923.authors: Tong Wu, Nicolay Rusnachenko, Huizhi Liang
